title: isodon rugosiformis
intro: Isodon rugosiformis, also known as the roughleaf isodon, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family and is native to China and other parts of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Isodon rugosiformis include reducing fever, alleviating cough and respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Isodon rugosiformis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, or used in various herbal preparations, such as tinctures and capsules, to harness its medicinal properties.
